properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The land has been conquered But some of us are yet to take what's ours As we recognize what has been done Let's move on to claim our inheritance There is great strength When we unite in one mind and one accord So come help me, I'll help you Possess all that's yours

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Working together for the kingdom of God Working together in one accord Come help me, I'll help you There is so much work to do Working in harmony and love Under the leadership of the Dove Joining hearts and hands until we all stand In the stature of a perfect man

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One shall put a thousand to flight And two shall chase ten thousand We now see by this great unity How we can be made strong This body of Christ is fitly joined together and every joint supplies So under the headship of the Captain of the Lord of host we fight
